recentTweets.text: On the passing of Senator Lindsey Graham of South Carolina, may he rest in peace. My thoughts and prayers to his family.

IN CASE YOU MISSED IT: Congressman Al Green Joined Community Leaders, Coalition Groups, Labor Unions, and Other Elected Officials in a Candlelight Vigil Honoring the Life of Lorenzo Salgado Araujo

Congressman Al Green’s remarks at the vigil can be accessed by clicking here:

For more information click here: https://t.co/Z0DwM47WpH https://t.co/EwCNJ5IE4m

Last night I joined community leaders, coalition groups, elected officials, and the people of Houston to demand answers in the ICE shooting of Lorenzo Salgado Araujo. 

We must not let his name be forgotten, and must demand that a full transparent investigation is completed and https://t.co/OuiSrJ80MV

Sylvia Garcia, Roman Palomares-LULAC, Johnny Mata-Greater Houston Justice Coalition, Bishop James Dixon, II-NAACP, FIEL, Community Leaders, and the Family of Laurenzo Salgado Araujo, Demanding Immediate Investigation and Congressional Oversight Following https://t.co/XtjPxvvtSV

As America celebrates 250 years of Independence, we must remember that more than 240 years of free labor (slavery) helped build this Nation. We honor our economic Foundational Mothers & Fathers, the enslaved, by pursuing reconciliation and addressing the vestiges of slavery. https://t.co/3FKr3ScNwx

Al Green after witnessing a U.S. military major arrested at the Capitol following today’s press conference with Jessica Denson, the Removal Coalition, Defenders of Our Republic, About Face Veterans, and others calling for President Trump’s impeachment. https://t.co/JBrU3McUPW

Reps. Randall & Green Introduce LGBTQIA+ Pride Month Resolution.

Today, I joined the Tri-Caucus to mark SCOTUS’s ruling protecting birthright citizenship. While we breathe a sigh of relief, this nonunanimous decision reminds us this fundamental constitutional right cannot be taken for granted. The fight to protect all Americans continues. https://t.co/lZSQqUArIp

assessment.summary: The local archive has not captured a tweet from this account that matches TOR Phi's Kurdistan Lens terms yet. Capture more timeline pages and targeted Kurdistan searches before drawing a social-media conclusion.
assessment.whatItWasLike: No Kurdistan, Kurds, KRG/IKBY, Erbil, Peshmerga, Northern Iraq, PKK/YPG, Iraq/Syria, Yazidi/Sinjar, or energy-linked tweet is present in the profile window yet.
